tracks.rawText: 3:43Solar Ritual”v5Coversoulful R&B ballad inspired by Alicia Keys, emotional piano chords, live drums, gospel choir harmonies, jazzy electric bass, and warm analog tone, strong, soulful female vocals full of emotion and power — a mix between Fallin’ and Girl on Fire — singing about inner strength, rebirth, and love, dynamic, cinematic energy, uplifting outro with choir and stringsAliciake2PublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 3:32Solar Ritual”v5CoverThe track opens with syncopated Afrobeat percussion—crisp hi-hats, talking drum, and congas—layered with electronic synth bass and pulsing chords, Melodic arpeggios and atmospheric pads build through the verses, while bright brass samples and vocal chops lift the chorus2PublishRemix
